---
title: "Program"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
## Program
:::


::: {.schedule-wrap}
::: {.schedule-grid}

<!-- ::: {.schedule-corner} -->
<!-- Time -->
<!-- ::: -->

::: {.day-header style="grid-column: 2;"}
**Day 1**  
Wednesday, 23.9
:::

::: {.day-header style="grid-column: 3;"}
**Day 2**  
Thursday, 24.9
:::

::: {.day-header style="grid-column: 4;"}
**Day 3**  
Friday, 25.9
:::

<!-- Time labels: each row is a 15-minute step starting from 10:00. -->

<!-- ::: {.time-label style="grid-row: 2;"} -->
<!-- 10:00 -->
<!-- ::: -->
<!---->
<!-- ::: {.time-label style="grid-row: 6;"} -->
<!-- 11:00 -->
<!-- ::: -->
<!---->
<!-- ::: {.time-label style="grid-row: 10;"} -->
<!-- 12:00 -->
<!-- ::: -->
<!---->
<!-- ::: {.time-label style="grid-row: 14;"} -->
<!-- 13:00 -->
<!-- ::: -->
<!---->
<!-- ::: {.time-label style="grid-row: 18;"} -->
<!-- 14:00 -->
<!-- ::: -->
<!---->
<!-- ::: {.time-label style="grid-row: 22;"} -->
<!-- 15:00 -->
<!-- ::: -->
<!---->
<!-- ::: {.time-label style="grid-row: 26;"} -->
<!-- 16:00 -->
<!-- ::: -->
<!---->
<!-- ::: {.time-label style="grid-row: 30;"} -->
<!-- 17:00 -->
<!-- ::: -->

<!-- Day 1 -->

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 2; grid-row: 3 / 8;"}
**Introduction**   10:15–10:50  
Simon Weinzierl
:::

::: {.schedule-event .coffee style="grid-column: 2; grid-row: 8 / 11;"}
**Coffee break**   10:50–11:15
:::

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 2; grid-row: 11 / 16;"}
**Topology Talk 1**  11:15–11:50  
Nicolas Maduro
:::

::: {.schedule-event .lunch style="grid-column: 2; grid-row: 16 / 20;"}
**Lunch break**  
11:50–14:15
:::

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 2; grid-row: 20 / 25;"}
**Topology Talk 2**  
14:15–14:50  
Speaker TBA
:::

::: {.schedule-event .coffee style="grid-column: 2; grid-row: 25 / 28;"}
**Coffee break** 14:50–15:15
:::

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 2; grid-row: 28 / 33;"}
**Talk 4**  
15:15–15:50
Speaker TBA
:::

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 2; grid-row: 33 / 38;"}
**Talk 5**  
15:50–16:25
Speaker TBA
:::

<!-- Day 2 -->

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 3; grid-row: 3 / 8;"}
**Minilecture - Metric Algebraic Geometry**
10:15–10:50  
Speaker TBA
:::

::: {.schedule-event .coffee style="grid-column: 3; grid-row: 8 / 11;"}
**Coffee break**  10:50–11:15
:::

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 3; grid-row: 11 / 16;"}
**Geometry Talk 1**  
11:15–11:50  
Speaker TBA
:::

::: {.schedule-event .lunch style="grid-column: 3; grid-row: 16 / 20;"}
**Lunch break**  
11:50–14:15
:::

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 3; grid-row: 20 / 25;"}
**Geometry Talk 2**  
14:15–14:50  
Speaker TBA
:::

::: {.schedule-event .coffee style="grid-column: 3; grid-row: 25 / 28;"}
**Coffee break**  14:50–15:15
:::

<!-- ::: {.schedule-event .tutorial style="grid-column: 3; grid-row: 28 / 38;"} -->
<!-- **Tutorial / Discussion**   -->
<!-- 15:15–17:00   -->
<!-- Topic TBA -->
<!-- ::: -->

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 3; grid-row: 28 / 33;"}
**Talk 9**  
15:15–15:50
Speaker TBA
:::

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 3; grid-row: 33 / 38;"}
**Topology Talk 3**  
15:50–16:25
Speaker TBA
:::



<!-- Day 3 -->

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 4; grid-row: 3 / 8;"}
**Talk 11**  10:15–10:50  
Speaker TBA
:::

::: {.schedule-event .coffee style="grid-column: 4; grid-row: 8 / 11;"}
**Coffee break**  10:50–11:15
:::

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 4; grid-row: 11 / 16;"}
**Geometry Talk 3**  
11:15–11:50  
Speaker TBA
:::

::: {.schedule-event .lunch style="grid-column: 4; grid-row: 16 / 20;"}
**Lunch break**  
11:50–14:15
:::

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 4; grid-row: 20 / 25;"}
**Talk 13**  
14:15–14:50  
Speaker TBA
:::

::: {.schedule-event .coffee style="grid-column: 4; grid-row: 25 / 28;"}
**Coffee break**   14:50–15:15
:::

::: {.schedule-event .discussion style="grid-column: 4; grid-row: 28 / 33;"}
**Panel Discussion**  
15:15–17:00  
:::

:::
:::
